queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS _time, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time

SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS _time, COUNT(CASE WHEN load_factor > 50.0 THEN 1 END) AS high_load_cnt, COUNT(CASE WHEN load_factor <= 50.0 THEN 1 END) AS low_load_cnt FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY _time ORDER BY _time ASC

expected.note: Histogram with conditional COUNT using CASE

queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS bucket_time, facility_zone, COUNT(*) AS zone_events, ROUND(AVG(throughput_rate), 2) AS avg_tput FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY bucket_time, facility_zone ORDER BY bucket_time ASC, facility_zone ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '30 seconds') AS bucket, COUNT(*) AS cnt, SUM(item_count) AS items, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp), 2) AS avg_temp, ROUND(AVG(charge_remaining), 2) AS avg_charge FROM "{stream}" WHERE operation_mode != 'manual' GROUP BY bucket ORDER BY bucket ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '2 minutes') AS time_window, operation_mode, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE load_factor > 50.0) AS high_load_count, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE load_factor <= 50.0) AS low_load_count, COUNT(*) AS total FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY time_window, operation_mode ORDER BY time_window ASC, operation_mode ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '5 minutes') AS block, sorter_model, COUNT(*) AS samples, ROUND(MIN(throughput_rate), 2) AS floor_tput, ROUND(MAX(throughput_rate), 2) AS ceiling_tput FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY block, sorter_model HAVING COUNT(*) >= 2 ORDER BY block ASC, ceiling_tput DESC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp) AS time_slot, control_center, COUNT(*) AS events, ROUND(SUM(package_size) * 1.0 / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 2) AS avg_pkg FROM "{stream}" WHERE package_size >= 250 GROUP BY time_slot, control_center ORDER BY time_slot ASC, events DESC

expected.note: Auto-interval histogram + control_center breakdown with package filter

queries.sql: SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '1 minute') AS minute_slot, COUNT(*) AS total_events, COUNT(DISTINCT pallet_id) AS distinct_pallets, COUNT(DISTINCT conveyor_lane) AS distinct_lanes FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY minute_slot ORDER BY minute_slot ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '3 minutes') AS interval_bucket, conveyor_lane, operation_mode, COUNT(*) AS cnt, ROUND(AVG(scan_attempts), 2) AS avg_scan FROM "{stream}" WHERE scan_attempts >= 1 GROUP BY interval_bucket, conveyor_lane, operation_mode ORDER BY interval_bucket ASC, cnt DESC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '4 minutes') AS window_block, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining >= 60.0) AS charged_ops, COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining < 30.0) AS low_charge_ops, ROUND(AVG(cell_temp) FILTER (WHERE charge_remaining < 30.0), 2) AS low_charge_avg_temp FROM "{stream}" GROUP BY window_block ORDER BY window_block ASC

SELECT histogram(_timestamp, '15 seconds') AS fine_bucket, COUNT(*) AS total, ROUND(AVG(defect_limit), 3) AS avg_defect, ROUND(STDDEV(throughput_rate), 2) AS tput_volatility FROM "{stream}" WHERE defect_limit IS NOT NULL AND throughput_rate IS NOT NULL GROUP BY fine_bucket HAVING COUNT(*) > 1 ORDER BY fine_bucket ASC

SELECT (_timestamp - (_timestamp % 3600000000)) AS time_bucket,
  facility_zone,
  COALESCE(operation_name, 'N/A') AS operation_name_display,
  COALESCE(build_version, 'N/A') AS build_version_display,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE (operation_name = 'SearchItems')
  AND (guard_mode <> 'true')
  AND (auth_result <> 'timeout')
  AND (guard_mode <> '')
  AND (guard_mode IS NOT NULL)
  AND ((entity_id NOT IN ('CID-ghi','CID-stu') OR entity_id IS NULL))
  AND (load_factor > 20)
  AND (threat_flag IS NULL OR threat_flag NOT LIKE '%Allowlisted%')
GROUP BY facility_zone, operation_name, build_version,
  (_timestamp - (_timestamp % 3600000000)), entity_id
HAVING (COUNT(*) > 0)
ORDER BY row_count DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT (_timestamp - (_timestamp % 3600000000)) AS time_bucket,
  control_center,
  COALESCE(site_name, 'N/A') AS site_name_display,
  COALESCE(region_code, 'N/A') AS region_code_display,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE (operation_name = 'UpdateItem')
  AND (guard_mode <> 'true')
  AND (auth_result <> 'invalid')
  AND (guard_mode <> '')
  AND (guard_mode IS NOT NULL)
  AND ((task_id NOT IN ('ORD-003','ORD-005') OR task_id IS NULL))
  AND (throughput_rate > 200)
  AND (threat_flag IS NULL OR threat_flag NOT LIKE '%Allowlisted%')
GROUP BY control_center, site_name, region_code,
  (_timestamp - (_timestamp % 3600000000)), task_id
HAVING (COUNT(*) > 0)
ORDER BY row_count DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT (_timestamp - (_timestamp % 7200000000)) AS time_bucket,
  site_name,
  COALESCE(operation_name, 'N/A') AS operation_name_display,
  COALESCE(build_version, 'N/A') AS build_version_display,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE (operation_name = 'PlaceOrder')
  AND (guard_mode <> 'true')
  AND (auth_result <> 'timeout')
  AND (guard_mode <> '')
  AND (guard_mode IS NOT NULL)
  AND ((auth_token NOT IN ('') OR auth_token IS NULL))
  AND (load_factor > 30)
  AND (threat_flag IS NULL OR threat_flag NOT LIKE '%Allowlisted%')
GROUP BY site_name, operation_name, build_version,
  (_timestamp - (_timestamp % 7200000000)), auth_token
HAVING (COUNT(*) > 0)
ORDER BY row_count DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT (_timestamp - (_timestamp % 1800000000)) AS time_bucket,
  sorter_model,
  COALESCE(operation_name, 'N/A') AS operation_name_display,
  COALESCE(control_center, 'N/A') AS control_center_display,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE (operation_name = 'searchItems')
  AND (guard_mode <> 'true')
  AND (auth_result <> 'timeout')
  AND (guard_mode <> '')
  AND (guard_mode IS NOT NULL)
  AND ((entity_id NOT IN ('CID-yza','CID-mno') OR entity_id IS NULL))
  AND (charge_remaining > 20)
  AND (auth_result IS NULL OR auth_result NOT LIKE '%Allowlisted%')
GROUP BY sorter_model, operation_name, control_center,
  (_timestamp - (_timestamp % 1800000000)), entity_id
HAVING (COUNT(*) > 0)
ORDER BY row_count DESC
LIMIT 10

SELECT (_timestamp - (_timestamp % 3600000000)) AS time_bucket,
  conveyor_lane,
  COALESCE(region_code, 'N/A') AS region_code_display,
  COALESCE(site_name, 'N/A') AS site_name_display,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count
FROM "{stream}"
WHERE (operation_name = 'DeleteItem')
  AND (guard_mode <> 'true')
  AND (auth_result <> 'invalid')
  AND (guard_mode <> '')
  AND (guard_mode IS NOT NULL)
  AND ((task_id NOT IN ('ORD-001','ORD-004') OR task_id IS NULL))
  AND (load_factor > 15)
  AND (threat_flag IS NULL OR threat_flag NOT LIKE '%Allowlisted%')
GROUP BY conveyor_lane, region_code, site_name,
  (_timestamp - (_timestamp % 3600000000)), task_id
HAVING (COUNT(*) > 0)
ORDER BY row_count DESC
LIMIT 10
